title: Natural Lotion: What It Is & How to Choose the Best
meta_description: Discover what makes a lotion truly natural, which ingredients to look for (and avoid), and how to find the best natural body lotion for your skin type. Shop clean picks.
image_prompt: Product photography, a styled scene centered on three white cylindrical pump-top body lotion bottles — Pure Unscented, Coconut Breeze, and Calming Lavender variants — each with a flat disc cap, arranged in a loose triangular grouping on a smooth white-oak wood tabletop with visible grain, accompanied by a small open glass jar of organic virgin coconut oil with a bamboo spatula resting across the rim, and a halved fresh coconut placed naturally to the right, warm golden morning side light from the left casting soft shadows across the bottles and coconut flesh, blurred out-of-focus soft green foliage in the background, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
